commands.cmd: primary-source NASEM 2023 adult EER equation and applicability review
commands.summary: Table 5-16 eight adult equations, units and weight-stable boundary captured
four explicit PAL categories and user-input limitations captured
schema-free adult non-pregnant/non-lactating preview/apply package identified

summary: Mapped an exact primary-source, adult-only, consent-gated NASEM 2023 EER package and excluded unsupported life stages without inference.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Scout exceeded the single-wait limit and was interrupted; the PM completed the same primary-source map as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: A Judge must verify every coefficient, applicability boundary, operation-idempotency design and manual-goal preservation before implementation.
Children, pregnancy and lactation remain unsupported until their additional inputs and equations receive separate review.
